objectives.text: Resolve a customer request and restock the floor
objectives.action: Talk to the customer, then run one backroom restock cycle
objectives.post_sale_text: First sale complete. Close the day when ready.
objectives.post_sale_action: Click Close Day in the HUD

pre_step.action: Press E to dismiss the note

steps.action: Press E at the customer to open the decision card

steps.text: Choose how you handle the request

steps.action: Press E to carry a stock box

steps.text: Place stock on the restock shelf
steps.action: Press E at the shelf to place the carried box
Press F4 to end the day

objectives.text: Find your pricing sweet spot
objectives.action: Right-click stocked items to adjust price

objectives.text: Keep the shelves alive
Keep the momentum going — watch for busy hours
End the week strong — hit your revenue target
objectives.action: Check today's revenue in the HUD

objectives.text: Weekend rush incoming — be ready to move volume
Close out week one and check your standings
New week, new stock — reorder before shelves empty
objectives.action: Place a reorder with your supplier

objectives.text: Price competitively — the mall economy is heating up
Tournament season begins — prepare your Creatures stock
objectives.action: Open a fresh pack at the counter

objectives.text: Keep regulars happy — their word spreads fast
Mid-stretch push — margins count now
Manage your staff wisely — wages eat into profit
Something feels off — pay attention to the regulars
Halfway point — review what is and is not selling
Double down on your best category
objectives.action: Stock more of your top seller

objectives.text: Clear slow stock — shelf space is money
Community events are drawing foot traffic
objectives.action: Greet the wave of new visitors

objectives.text: Stay ahead of market trends this week
Three weeks in — keep the pressure on
Main stretch is closing — begin the crunch
Crunch time — every sale counts toward the finish
Maximise volume without tanking your reputation
The regulars are watching — do not disappoint them
Final stretch — stock up and hold your prices
Four days left — stay focused
Three days — push for your best day yet
Two days left — clear the shelves
Last full day of business — make it count
Final day — reach $5 000 and close out strong
objectives.action: Close the day and see your ending
